perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman in an indoor studio setting holding up a large plaid shirt. She transitions into wearing the shirt over a black base layer with high brown boots, posing with a smile. (2) Phase two marks the introduction of 'Look 1' where she wears a beige cable-knit cardigan over the plaid shirt, a brown pleated skirt, white knee-high socks, and glasses. She adjusts her glasses and poses with a large brown leather bag. (3) Phase three shows 'Look 2' where she wears a pink and black argyle cardigan over a white collared shirt and the brown skirt, now wearing a brown beret and dancing playfully. (4) The final phase presents 'Look 3' consisting of a grey oversized cardigan, a light blue shirt with a striped tie, and a black leather beret. She smiles brightly and makes heart gestures toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo K-pop style song begins immediately with female vocals singing in Korean. The soundscape is clean with a strong rhythmic electronic beat. (2) The music continues as the primary audio element throughout the outfit transitions, maintaining a cheerful and energetic tone. No direct speech or dialogue from the on-screen subject is heard. (3) Subtle digital sound effects may occur during the visual transitions, but they are layered deeply beneath the loud, dominant background music which persists until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '韓系學院風' (Korean Academy Style) appears at the start as a hook to set the theme. (2) 'Look1' with pink sparkle effects identifies the first outfit ensemble. (3) 'Look2' with pink sparkle effects identifies the second outfit ensemble. (4) 'Look3' with pink sparkle effects identifies the third outfit ensemble.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Outfit Demo 1 -> Outfit Demo 2 -> Outfit Demo 3

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair styled in braids, wearing various 'academy style' layers including cardigans, pleated skirts, berets, and glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor studio with white brick-style walls, exposed ceiling pipes, a large brown velvet sectional sofa, a white round pendant light, and a simple table and chair.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, soft, and even studio lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a fashion lookbook to inspire viewers with 'Korean Academy' (Preppy) style outfits. It utilizes a montage of transitions where the creator physically changes her attire to demonstrate how different layers like cardigans and accessories can create varied looks within the same aesthetic theme.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The focus is entirely on the clothing items and the 'Look' labels suggest a coordinated fashion showcase typical of clothing brand promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Academy/Preppy aesthetic combined with K-pop background music.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively targets a young demographic interested in East Asian fashion trends through high-quality visual production and popular musical choices.
